data.body: 🎉 EPIC COMPLETE + FULLY LANDED. Identity stack MERGED to origin/main (a91917b65..bab4f8be3): 586302cf2 bffe, 0797b0964 ad42, 17938551d 472f+cc0b, 2bbc3ae6e 245e, d805f9fb3 1787, bab4f8be3 9e76 (submitted top 680, ancestors atomic). All 7 identity tasks closed (6 verified+signed; 1787 force-closed pending post-deploy canary run). Identity story 297d + EPIC 8d27 force-closed UNSIGNED due to Anthropic API credit exhaustion mid-close (completion-verifier 400 'credit balance too low' — unavailable, not failing on merit; documented evidence in force-close reasons). Bot private key discarded from job tmp. FINAL: config-prune half (6 changes) + identity half (6 changes) all landed on main; epic + 14 tickets closed. NOTE for user: Anthropic API credits exhausted; NOTE: 1787 canary + 297d/epic closed unsigned — top up credits + reopen/re-close to earn signatures if desired.
